  • Код модуля
  • app.schemas.tag

Исходный код app.schemas.tag

import uuid
from datetime import datetime

from pydantic import BaseModel




[документация]
class TagCreate(BaseModel):
    name: str
    color: str = "#8b5cf6"






[документация]
class TagResponse(BaseModel):
    id: uuid.UUID
    workspace_id: uuid.UUID
    name: str
    color: str
    created_at: datetime

    model_config = {"from_attributes": True}
